title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider LLM workflows by running the same coding task four ways across three GitHub issues, alternating which provider (Claude Opus or Kimi K2.6) handled planning versus implementation. An Opus-based evaluator scored the resulting pull requests on seven dimensions to determine the optimal provider mix.
